title: Kitniyot: Why Ashkenazi Jews Don't Eat Rice on Pesach (and Sephardim Do)
title_zh: Kitniyot（基特尼约特）：为什么德系犹太人逾越节不吃米饭（而塞法迪犹太人可以）
title_he: קִטְנִיּוֹת: למה יהודים אשכנזים לא אוכלים אורז בפסח (ויהודים ספרדים כן)
description: The history of the kitniyot prohibition, the 2015 ruling allowing some Ashkenazim to eat kitniyot, and the current state of the debate.

chinese_dynasties_referenced.context: When the kitniyot prohibition emerged in medieval Europe
When the Shulchan Aruch was compiled
